description_long: This is a compact, military-style SUV with a rugged, boxy frame and an open-top design. The exterior is painted in a camouflage green with a prominent white star insignia on the hood, evoking classic military vehicles such as the Willys Jeep. The vehicle features two brown leather seats, a simple dashboard, and a black roll cage for structural support. The wheels are thick and appear heavily worn, with visible mud and dirt, suggesting off-road capability. The doors are flat and minimalistic, and the rear of the vehicle is open, lacking a trunk or hatch. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical elements and a weathered, battle-ready finish.
description: A rugged, open-top military-style SUV in camouflage green with a white star on the hood, brown seats, and a black roll cage. The vehicle has a weathered, utilitarian look with muddy wheels and exposed details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white star on the hood, the windshield, and the exposed front grille and bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cabin, brown seats, black roll cage, and flat door panel.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open back, two brown seats, and the simple, flat rear panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cabin, roll cage, and camouflage paint.
attribute_wheel_design: solid, circular wheels with multiple small holes and a muddy, utilitarian finish
